Jinyoung Park

LinkedIn
Director, Murex Partners
I invest at the intersection of AI and the physical world — early-stage startups where software meets hardware, across robotics, semiconductors, and autonomous systems.

Before becoming an investor, I was an engineer. I contributed to the advanced development of Galaxy flagship smartphones, registering five patents, and led the development of an autonomous mobile robot using vision sensors and deep learning at Samsung C-Lab, successfully transitioning the project to the MX Business Division. My academic background is in mechanical engineering and robotics.

From this foundation, I believe AI's competitive edge comes not just from algorithms, but from the entire stack — including semiconductors, sensors, computing infrastructure, and system integration. Since joining Murex Partners in 2018, I've invested over $100M across 20+ companies at the seed and Series A stages, building a proven track record that includes IPO and M&A exits.

With my engineering background, hands-on field experience, and diverse investment portfolio, I aim to be more than a capital provider — I strive to be a partner who truly understands the technology, the product, and the industry. Even after investment, I look in the same direction as the founding team, working through challenges together with trust — aspiring to be a genuine one-team partner.
AI와 물리 세계의 접점에 투자하고 있습니다.
로보틱스, 반도체, 자율시스템 등 소프트웨어와 하드웨어가 만나는 영역의 초기 스타트업에 집중합니다.

투자자가 되기 전에는 엔지니어였습니다. 갤럭시 플래그십 스마트폰 선행개발에 참여하며 5건의 특허를 등록했고, 삼성 C-Lab에서는 비전 센서와 딥러닝 기반 자율이동 로봇 개발을 리드해 MX 사업부 이관까지 이끌었습니다. 대학에서는 기계공학과 로보틱스를 전공했습니다.

이러한 경험을 바탕으로 AI의 경쟁력은 알고리즘뿐 아니라 반도체, 센서, 컴퓨팅 인프라, 시스템 통합 등 인프라를 포함한 전체 스택에서 나온다고 믿습니다. 2018년 뮤렉스파트너스 합류 이후 시드·시리즈 A 중심으로 20개 이상 기업에 +$100M을 투자했으며, IPO와 M&A를 포함한 검증된 성과를 만들어가고 있습니다.

공학적 배경과 현장 경험, 그리고 다양한 투자 경험을 바탕으로 저는 단순히 자본을 제공하는 투자자가 아니라, 기술과 제품, 그리고 산업의 본질을 함께 이해하는 파트너가 되고자 합니다. 투자 이후에도 창업팀과 같은 방향을 바라보며, 신뢰를 바탕으로 함께 문제를 풀어가는 진정성 있는 원팀이 되는 것을 지향합니다.

2026
Physical AI Infrastructure
My investment thesis, 'Physical AI Infrastructure' focuses on the foundational layers required to deploy AI in the physical world. As robots, autonomous systems, and embodied AI move from lab to production, the critical bottleneck shifts from algorithms to infrastructure — simulation & world models, middleware & OS, edge compute, system testing & V&V, and cybersecurity for physical AI. I invest 2–3 years ahead of mainstream adoption into the infrastructure startups that will become deployment prerequisites, at the intersection of software and hardware in regulated enterprise markets.
2024
AI-Driven Deep Tech Transformation
My investment thesis centers on the transformation of deep tech sectors including manufacturing, energy, semiconductors, and space, where traditional software is increasingly replaced or enhanced by AI-driven solutions. Tasks currently dependent on human labor and expertise, as well as processes relying on conventional software systems, are rapidly transitioning to AI-powered alternatives.
2022
Redefining Humanity
My investment thesis, 'Redefining Humanity' centered on the transformative potential of AI, robotics, semiconductors, and advanced technologies — innovations poised to revolutionize industries and liberate humanity from the constraints of labor, paving the way for a future defined by creativity and higher purpose.
